title: Shrinkr - URL Shortener
description: A powerful URL shortening service with analytics, custom aliases, and QR code generation. Built with modern web technologies for optimal performance.
longDescription: Shrinkr is a comprehensive URL shortening platform that provides users with detailed analytics, custom short links, and QR code generation. Features include link expiration, password protection, and real-time click tracking.
features: Custom URL aliases with availability checking
QR code generation for easy sharing
Responsive design with dark mode support

title: MemeCasso - AI Meme Generator
description: An AI-powered meme generation platform that creates hilarious memes using machine learning. Combines creativity with cutting-edge technology.
longDescription: MemeCasso leverages advanced AI models to generate contextual and humorous memes. Users can input topics or themes, and the AI creates relevant memes with appropriate images and text.
features: Custom meme creation with user inputs

title: Paathshala - E-Learning Platform
description: A comprehensive e-learning platform connecting students with quality educational content. Features interactive courses, assessments, and progress tracking.
longDescription: Paathshala is an innovative learning management system designed to make education accessible. It includes video lectures, quizzes, assignments, and a robust progress tracking system for both students and instructors.
features: Real-time quiz system with instant feedback
